title: Build progress early in the day
content: When morning intake is low, a reminder should focus on starting early rather than trying to catch up all at once later.
reminder_example: Try finishing one glass of water before lunch so the rest of the day feels easier.

title: Use timed micro-breaks
content: On busy days, short timed reminders and easy-to-reach water placement are more realistic than vague advice.
reminder_example: Set a short phone alarm for your next break and keep a bottle where you can see it.

title: Pair hydration with activity
content: When temperature or exercise load is high, reminders should connect hydration to activity recovery and comfort.
reminder_example: Have water ready right after exercise so rehydration happens automatically.

title: Link water to an existing routine
content: When the person missed the goal yesterday, reminders should connect hydration to an existing habit instead of relying on motivation alone.
reminder_example: Pair your next water break with an action you already do every afternoon.
